hero.title: A serene escape overlooking the French Riviera
hero.subtitle: Charming boutique hotel with panoramic views of the bay of Villefranche-sur-Mer

accueil.intro_title: Welcome to La Fiancée du Pirate
accueil.intro_text: Nestled on the cliffside (moyenne corniche) between Nice and Monaco, our intimate and unique 15-room boutique hotel offers an exceptional setting and breath-taking panoramic views of the Mediterranean Sea.
accueil.intro_subtext: Our entire team is at your complete disposal to make your stay unforgettable. Feel at home, but with all the comforts of a hotel!
accueil.card_view_text: Admire the spectacular view of the bay of Villefranche and Saint-Jean-Cap-Ferrat from our terrace while enjoying a drink.
accueil.card_pool_text: Enjoy our quiet, sunny swimming pool, relax in our jacuzzi, or unwind in the private lounge areas of our lush garden.
accueil.card_breakfast_text: A delicious buffet served daily from 8:30 to 10:30 on our panoramic terrace overlooking the sea.
accueil.card_location_text: Privileged location on the moyenne corniche, with direct staircase access to the historic old town and beaches.
accueil.explore_rooms_text: Fully renovated, air-conditioned, and equipped with queen or king-size beds for ultimate comfort.
accueil.myblackcab_text: For all your travels along the Riviera, contact our partner Myblackcab directly for a premium private chauffeur service.

rooms.title: Our Rooms & Pavilions
rooms.subtitle: Renovated for your utmost comfort, combining tranquility, privacy, and elegance.
rooms.garden_desc: These pleasant rooms allow you to fully enjoy the garden with their private terraces.
rooms.garden_details: Available in Double, Triple, and Family options, they feature a cozy private terrace opening onto our green sanctuary.
rooms.mer_desc: Spacious and welcoming, these rooms offer breathtaking panoramic views of the bay of Villefranche-sur-Mer and Cap Ferrat.
rooms.mer_details: Available in Double, Triple, or Quadruple configurations. Wake up facing the deep blue Mediterranean.
rooms.pavillons_desc: Separated from the main building, our two private pavilions offer a unique space of freedom and well-being.
rooms.pavillons_details: The Pavillon de la Fiancée is perfect for couples seeking romance. The Pavillon du Pirate is ideal for families thanks to its prime location.

garden_specs.bed: Queen Size bed or twin beds

mer_specs.bed: King Size or Queen Size bed

pavillons_specs.bed: Queen Size or King Size bed

rooms.footer_question: Any questions about our room amenities?

services.title: Services & Activities
services.subtitle: Everything you need for an exceptional stay on the French Riviera.
services.hotel_services_desc: Enjoy our high-end amenities designed for your absolute relaxation.
services.service_pool_desc: An outdoor swimming pool, heated according to the season, and a jacuzzi available upon request.
services.service_garden_desc: A large Mediterranean garden with cozy, intimate seating areas to read, rest, or enjoy a drink.
services.service_breakfast_desc: Served on the sea-facing terrace, featuring fresh local products to start your day beautifully.
services.service_cab_desc: Airport transfers in 20 min, bus lines to Nice and Monaco nearby, and our private transport partner Myblackcab.
services.activities_desc: A charming, timeless coastal town of art and history.
services.citadelle_desc: An imposing 16th-century fortress built to protect the bay. Today it houses the City Hall and 4 museums (including the Volti Museum and Goetz-Boumeester Museum). Free entry.
services.chapelle_desc: Fully restored and decorated in 1956 by the famous artist Jean Cocteau, this is a must-see masterpiece dedicated to the patron saint of fishermen.
services.rue_desc: A 130-meter covered medieval street dating back to the 14th century, once used as a defensive pathway and painted by Jean Cocteau.
services.port_desc: Historical 16th-century basin featuring ancient fortifications, a lighthouse, a traditional rope-walk, and an active yachting marina.
services.surroundings_desc: Our hotel is the ideal starting point to explore the Côte d'Azur:
services.surroundings_nice: Nice (10 min): Old Nice, the Cours Saleya flower market, and the Promenade des Anglais (easily accessible by bus).
services.surroundings_monaco: Monaco (20 min): The Palace, Monte-Carlo Casino, and the Oceanographic Museum.
services.surroundings_villages: The picturesque perched villages of Eze and Saint-Paul-de-Vence.
services.surroundings_italy: Italy is just 7 train stops away (regular departures from Villefranche station).

gallery.subtitle: Discover the enchanting setting of our boutique hotel in pictures.

reviews.title: What Our Guests Say
reviews.subtitle: Check out our guest reviews on TripAdvisor

items.author: Sophie L.
items.title: Breathtaking views and warm hospitality
items.text: An absolutely magical stay! The view over the bay of Villefranche is incredible from the breakfast terrace. The hotel is quiet, intimate, and the staff is wonderful. We will definitely return.

items.author: Thomas M.
items.title: A small piece of paradise
items.text: The pool and jacuzzi with sea view are perfect for relaxing after a day of sightseeing. Rooms are modern, well-equipped, and very clean. Perfectly situated to explore the region.

items.author: Elena R.
items.title: Absolute charm and quietness
items.text: Outstanding boutique hotel. The buffet breakfast is delicious and high quality, served in front of a picture-postcard view. The partner chauffeur service Myblackcab was perfect.

footer.desc: La Fiancée du Pirate, an intimate 15-room boutique hotel nestled on the heights of Villefranche-sur-Mer, between Nice and Monaco.
